name: Sweet and Sour Beef Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Beef flank or round steak
1/4 cup Green bell pepper, cut into squares
10 1/2 ounce Can Ready-to-serve French onion soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in freezer until partially frozen for easier slicing.
2. On a cutting board, slice beef, crosswise of grain, into 1/4 inch wide strips.
3. In a 10-inch skillet or wok over high heat with 3 tablespoons hot oil, cook carrots and green bell pepper for 2 minutes, stirring quickly and frequently.
4. Add snow peas; stir fry for an additional 2 minutes.
5. With a slotted spoon, remove vegetables to a plate.
6. Add remaining oil, ginger, garlic, and beef to skillet; stir fry until meat loses its pink color, about 2 minutes.
7. In a small bowl, blend cornstarch with soup; stir in vinegar and sugar.
8. Gradually stir the mixture into the skillet; cook, stirring constantly until thickened.
9. Return cooked vegetables to skillet; heat thoroughly.
10. Serve over rice, if desired. Makes 2 servings.
